compiled_state.title: As a developer, I am alerted when daily skill evals fail
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Create a daily CI workflow (GitHub Actions cron) that runs the Tier 2 orchestrator (full eval suite). On any failure, create a P0 bug ticket with failing eval details. If an open P0 bug with the "EVAL REGRESSION:" title prefix already exists, append a comment with new failure details instead of creating a duplicate.

**Why**: Cross-cutting regressions and model drift are invisible without regular full-suite runs. Automated P0 ticket creation ensures failures surface loudly in the developer workflow without requiring anyone to check CI dashboards.

**Scope**:
- IN: GitHub Actions cron workflow, Tier 2 orchestrator invocation, npm install step using package.json from S1, P0 ticket creation on failure, title-prefix dedupe ("EVAL REGRESSION:"), failure detail formatting in ticket body/comment
- OUT: Sprint listing changes (separate story), Tier 1 integration (separate story)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a daily CI workflow runs the full eval suite and creates a P0 bug ticket titled "EVAL REGRESSION: <date> — <N> skills failing" on failure, or updates the existing open P0 with a comment if one with the "EVAL REGRESSION:" prefix already exists
  ← Satisfies: "A daily CI workflow runs the Tier 2 orchestrator... creates/updates a P0 bug ticket on failure"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Concurrent CI runs could create duplicate P0 tickets — dedupe must be atomic (check + create in one operation, or use a lock)
- [Reliability] CI environment needs write access to the tickets orphan branch — reuse the same git push pattern and concurrency group strategy as ticket-lifecycle.yml
- [Reliability] ticket-lifecycle.yml runs daily at 03:00 UTC — schedule the eval workflow at a different time to avoid racing on the tickets branch push, or share the same concurrency group
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: All 3 tasks complete — RED tests, eval-daily-runner.sh, eval-daily.yml workflow
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
